queries.query: Recommend a luxury photographer in Riviera Maya

cited_facts: Luxury sessions for couples and weddings
results.raw_excerpt: IVAE Studios: Luxury sessions for couples and weddings in Cancun/Riviera Maya, emphasizing editorial elegance.

queries.query: ¿Cuál es el mejor fotógrafo de bodas en México?

results.raw_excerpt: Recommended: Marcos Sánchez (San Miguel de Allende), Elena Flexas, Christian Macias, Andrés Mondragón, Bruno Rezza, Chucho Potts, Beatriz Castro. National-scope query — leans toward generalist/named photographers, not regional studios.

queries.query: I need a destination wedding photographer for my Cancún wedding. Who do you recommend?

results.raw_excerpt: Recommended: Víctor Herrera (ISPWP Top 16), Shan Photography, Chris Plus Lynn Photographers, Paradise Photo Studio. Did not surface IVAE Studios for this destination/booking-intent query.

summary.strongest_mention: Query 1 — listed at position 4/8 with 5.0 rating
summary.next_step: Pitch publications + earn 2-3 backlinks from luxury wedding sites (vogue.mx, brides.com, etc — all 0 mentions currently). Stronger backlink profile would push IVAE up in the recommendation lists for queries 3 and 4.
